query:
-- Update services.monthlyCost for all Vocus Mobile SIMs on retail_offering customers
UPDATE services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
SET s.monthlyCost = '15.00', s.costSource = 'manual'
WHERE s.provider = 'Vocus' AND s.serviceType = 'Mobile'
AND c.customerType = 'retail_offering';

-- Also update vocus_mobile_services.planCost for those with VMS records
UPDATE vocus_mobile_services vms
JOIN services s ON vms.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
SET vms.planCost = '15.00'
WHERE s.provider = 'Vocus' AND s.serviceType = 'Mobile'
AND c.customerType = 'retail_offering';
